title: schoenoplectiella mucronata var. ishizawae

side_effects: Schoenoplectiella mucronata var. ishizawae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and skin irritation in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption or prolonged use of this plant may lead to kidney damage or exacerbate pre-existing kidney conditions.
